name: jade-ai-authenticator
description: Formal jade AI authentication module with frontend, backend and real multimodal AI provider integration.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
